title: Iceberg tables ignore compression algorithms
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal('/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/', CSV, 'gzip');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
SELECT c0 FROM t0;
/*
DB::Exception: inflate failed: data error:
While reading from: /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/data/data-256610b7-246a-4dab-ae80-2698a1f2c430.parquet:
(in file/uri /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/data/data-256610b7-246a-4dab-ae80-2698a1f2c430.parquet):
While executing ParallelParsingBlockInputFormat: While executing ReadFromObjectStorage. (ZLIB_INFLATE_FAILED)
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 354. DB::Exception: inflate failed: data error: While reading from: /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/data/data-ecbfea69-8b9b-4d24-a2ce-aad400f7ae44.parquet: (in file/uri /var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/data/data-ecbfea69-8b9b-4d24-a2ce-aad400f7ae44.parquet): While executing ParallelParsingBlockInputFormat: While executing ReadFromObjectStorage. (ZLIB_INFLATE_FAILED), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000265c68f2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:116: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x000000001409c1a6
2. src/Common/Exception.h:119: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000cd915ac
3. src/Common/Exception.h:137: DB::Exception::Exception<char const*, String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<char const*>::type, std::type_identity<String>::type>, char const*&&, String&&) @ 0x0000000012d07eb6
4. src/IO/ZlibInflatingReadBuffer.cpp:111: DB::ZlibInflatingReadBuffer::nextImpl() @ 0x000000001438bf3a
5. src/IO/ReadBuffer.h:64: DB::ReadBuffer::next() @ 0x000000000ce9fdc5
6. src/IO/ReadBuffer.h:114: DB::loadAtPosition(DB::ReadBuffer&, DB::Memory<Allocator<false, false>>&, char*&) @ 0x0000000014182b70
7. src/Processors/Formats/Impl/CSVRowInputFormat.cpp:524: DB::fileSegmentationEngineCSVImpl(DB::ReadBuffer&, DB::Memory<Allocator<false, false>>&, unsigned long, unsigned long, unsigned long, DB::FormatSettings const&) @ 0x000000001e750d91
8. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001e80c253
9. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<true, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (DB::ParallelParsingInputFormat::*)(std::shared_ptr<DB::ThreadGroup>), DB::ParallelParsingInputFormat*, std::shared_ptr<DB::ThreadGroup>>(void (DB::ParallelParsingInputFormat::*&&)(std::shared_ptr<DB::ThreadGroup>), DB::ParallelParsingInputFormat*&&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ThreadGroup>&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x000000001e80fa1d
10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x00000000141e29a6
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: void* std::__thread_proxy[abi:se190107]<std::tuple<std::unique_ptr<std::__thread_struct, std::default_delete<std::__thread_struct>>, void (ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<std::thread>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>>(void*) @ 0x00000000141e93c0
12. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
13. __GI___clone3 @ 0x0000000000133c9c
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT c0, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT c0, c1 FROM t1 WHERE c2 > (SELECT AVG(c2) FROM t1);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (NULL, 'null_value', NULL);
key_bug_features: Iceberg tables ignore specified compression algorithms
